notes:
Phase 79 complete for protein-truth-desk. Phase 24 complete for memorydesk. 0 stubs in both projects.

## Auth Migration (2026-06-10) — commit 5910511
- Replaced Manus OAuth redirect (api.manus.im, unavailable in Cloud Run) with magic-link dialog
- openSignInDialog() dispatches 'td:open-sign-in' custom event; TopNav listens and opens MagicLinkDialog
- 8 call sites migrated: useAuth, main.tsx, DashboardLayout, Home, Pricing, MonitoringFeed, Registry, Submit
- Magic link auth (email_ prefix) makes zero calls to api.manus.im — fully Cloud Run compatible
- getLoginUrl() kept as deprecated shim (calls openSignInDialog, returns '#')
- /api/oauth/callback still registered for existing session compatibility
- TypeScript: 0 errors | Tests: 1953/1953 passing

## Infrastructure Note
- api.manus.im is publicly routable (confirmed IPs: 52.21.202.72, 3.225.187.208, etc.)
- Cloud Run has no outbound internet egress by default — this is a Manus platform config issue
- Workaround: magic-link auth path never calls api.manus.im, so auth works in production
- Reported to Manus team via help.manus.im for VPC egress fix
